title: Tempting Pungent Malaysian Rigatoni Pasta
description: A pungent and fluffy Malaysian dish featuring rigatoni, perfect for midnight cravings, this recipe combines ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients for a unique flavor experience.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat and sauté the onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Add the cubed tofu to the skillet and cook until golden brown.
In a small bowl, whisk together the sambal sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Pour the sauce mixture over the tofu and onion mixture in the skillet and stir to combine.
Using a syringe or spoon, drop small amounts of the sauce mixture into a bath of water with sodium alginate to create spherified pearls.
Drain the cooked rigatoni and add it to the skillet with the tofu and sauce mixture.
Toss the rigatoni in the skillet to combine with the sauce and tofu.
Garnish with chopped scallions and serve immediately.
